query:
SELECT pv.id, pv.variantName, pv.variantCode,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM variant_pricing vp WHERE vp.variantId = pv.id AND vp.isCurrent = 1) as pricing_count
FROM product_variants pv
WHERE pv.productId = 60001
ORDER BY pv.id;
command:
